name: The Cave Training Facility and Card Shop
about: The Cave Training Facility and Card Shop is an indoor multi-sport training center located in Leonard, Texas. It features both indoor batting cages for baseball/softball and a high-tech golf simulator for year-round practice. The facility is climate-controlled and equipped with premium Uneekor Eye XO technology and launch monitors. Pricing is structured for both casual users and members, with hourly rental rates and a monthly membership option available for those who frequent the facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Uneekor Eye XO technology with advanced launch monitor for detailed swing feedback
Climate-controlled environment for comfortable practice regardless of weather
Wide selection of 100K virtual golf courses available on demand
Structured rental pricing with discounted rates for monthly members

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned. BYOB policy is not explicitly stated.
No alcohol service or bar mentioned on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor with ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are available for rental. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the golf simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.notes: The website does not mention a food and drink policy or any on-site catering options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes on the simulator. Typical simulator rounds can vary from 1.5 to 3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is listed as kid-friendly, offering batting cages which are suitable for youth players, and a golf simulator that can be used by people of all ages.
